title: AWS Integration
description: Build S3 bucket, file upload, and website deployment components using the AWS SDK.
provider_intro: Wrap AWS clients in a context provider. Child components access the S3 client, region, and account ID via hooks. The provider fetches the account ID with useAsyncOutput and waits for it with Show before rendering children.
bucket_intro: The Bucket component creates an S3 bucket with useAsyncOutput. It checks saved outputs to skip creation on restart. The cleanup handler empties and deletes the bucket when the component is removed from the tree. Children render only after the bucket is ready.
s3_file_intro: The S3File component uploads content to S3. It hashes the content and compares against saved state to skip uploads when nothing changed.
website_intro: WebSite composes Bucket and S3File. The bucket creates and configures itself, then S3File uploads content as a child.
warning_cleanup: Implement cleanup handlers for AWS resources. Without cleanup, removing a component from the tree won't delete the underlying resource.
